title: Orient Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Orient Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!
